items.h: Thekla Wants Raise For AEW Women's Division In Exchange For Second Blood & Guts Match
items.p: AEW Women's World Champion Thekla enjoyed the first women's Blood & Guts match, but thinks the division deserves a raise if there's going to be a second one.

items.h: Former WWE Star Rico Discusses Battle With Blood Clots
items.p: Former WWE tag champ Rico Constantino, who also appeared in AEW, recently opened up about his longstanding battle with blood clots.
